item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: While community welfare is important, suppressing individual freedoms undermines the very fabric of a just society.

notes: Both agents end opposed to rigidly prioritizing society over individual rights while still endorsing balance. Agent A visibly strengthens from a balanced disagreement in turn 1 to a firmer individual-rights protection frame by turn 3. Agent B also moves somewhat toward stronger safeguards for individual liberty while continuing to acknowledge societal responsibility. Turn 4 contains a language-holding artifact in Agent B's text: "the印尼 perspective".
